use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms and interfaces
Navigation triggers between pages or sections
Interactive controls for modal dialogs and overlays
State toggles and submit actions in applications
ai_summary: A reusable button component with variant support (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and standard Tailwind CSS styling with focus-visible accessibility states. Supports asChild prop for polymorphic rendering.
